'''âth-th-m''' ('''kathatham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magdump|magdump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magdump|magdump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kathatham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatham|thithatham]] || [[word:jithatham|jithatham]] || [[word:shithatham|shithatham]] || [[word:kithatham|kithatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatham|thuthuthatham]] || [[word:jujuthatham|jujuthatham]] || [[word:shushuthatham|shushuthatham]] || [[word:kukuthatham|kukuthatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatham|thuthatham]] || [[word:juthatham|juthatham]] || [[word:shuthatham|shuthatham]] || [[word:kuthatham|kuthatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatham|thuthatham]] || [[word:juthatham|juthatham]] || [[word:shuthatham|shuthatham]] || [[word:kuthatham|kuthatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatham|thethatham]] || [[word:jethatham|jethatham]] || [[word:shethatham|shethatham]] || [[word:kethatham|kethatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatham|thothothatham]] || [[word:jojothatham|jojothatham]] || [[word:shoshothatham|shoshothatham]] || [[word:kokothatham|kokothatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatham|thothatham]] || [[word:jothatham|jothatham]] || [[word:shothatham|shothatham]] || [[word:kothatham|kothatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatham|thothatham]] || [[word:jothatham|jothatham]] || [[word:shothatham|shothatham]] || [[word:kothatham|kothatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthatham|thĂŠthatham]] || [[word:jĂŠthatham|jĂŠthatham]] || [[word:shĂŠthatham|shĂŠthatham]] || [[word:kĂŠthatham|kĂŠthatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatham|thathathatham]] || [[word:jajathatham|jajathatham]] || [[word:shashathatham|shashathatham]] || [[word:kakathatham|kakathatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatham|thathatham]] || [[word:jathatham|jathatham]] || [[word:shathatham|shathatham]] || [[word:kathatham|kathatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatham|thathatham]] || [[word:jathatham|jathatham]] || [[word:shathatham|shathatham]] || [[word:kathatham|kathatham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathatham|shathatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathatham|goshathatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathatham|gokishathatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathathamnĂŒ|shathathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathathamnknĂŒ|goshathathamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathamnĂŒ|gokishathathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathathamshĂ«|shathathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathathamnkshĂ«|goshathathamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathathamshĂ«|gokishathathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathamro|shathathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathamnkro|goshathathamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathamro|gokishathathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathamu|shathathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathamnkmu|goshathathamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathamu|gokishathathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathathamsher|shathathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathathamnksher|goshathathamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathathamsher|gokishathathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathathamng|shathathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathathamnkng|goshathathamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathathamng|gokishathathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathathamya|shathathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathathamnkya|goshathathamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathathamya|gokishathathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathathamyam|shathathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathathamnkyam|goshathathamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathathamyam|gokishathathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathamnĂŒshĂ«|shathathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathathamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathamnĂŒro|shathathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathamnknĂŒro|goshathathamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathamnĂŒro|gokishathathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathamnĂŒmu|shathathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathamnknĂŒmu|goshathathamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathamnĂŒmu|gokishathathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathamshĂ«nĂŒ|shathathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathamshĂ«ro|shathathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathamnkshĂ«ro|goshathathamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathamshĂ«ro|gokishathathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathamshĂ«mu|shathathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathamnkshĂ«mu|goshathathamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathamshĂ«mu|gokishathathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathamronĂŒ|shathathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathamnkronĂŒ|goshathathamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathamronĂŒ|gokishathathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathamroshĂ«|shathathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathamnkroshĂ«|goshathathamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathamroshĂ«|gokishathathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathamromu|shathathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathamnkromu|goshathathamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathamromu|gokishathathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathathamunĂŒ|shathathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathathamnkmunĂŒ|goshathathamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathathamunĂŒ|gokishathathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathathamushĂ«|shathathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathathamnkmushĂ«|goshathathamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathathamushĂ«|gokishathathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathathamuro|shathathamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathathamnkmuro|goshathathamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathathamuro|gokishathathamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
